title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought I heard El's voice... and a lot of
cheering.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She's incredible... She's always on the mic and
pumping up the crowd, bragging about how she's
gonna win.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El's commitment to winning is really amazing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But I'm not gonna let that stop me!
